_meta.authority: Combat is server-authoritative; the client renders a resolved replay (RoundData/FightBehaviour/BehaviourRet). The damage formula is UNKNOWN_SERVER_SIDE. Constants below are STATED rules + inputs only.

team.win_condition: A side loses when its Commander loses all troops.
team.source: Tips.csv Id=10/Id=30; Language_SysTip row285; decompiled:124036-124037 (FightPos==1 = Commander); decompiled:37708-37762 (FightPos<=3 vs >=4)

round_phase_order.what: per-unit BeforeAction[BehaviourRet]: DoT (Burn108/Curse109), periodic Self-Heal(107), pre-round CC rolls (Arcane Missile 154)
per-unit BehaviourList[BehaviourAction]: normal attack + skills fired

round_phase_order_note: Units are iterated in the server-given RoundData.BList order (decompiled:19493-19531, 37450); client never sorts.
skill_activation_order_note: Within-unit resolution order (NOT cross-unit turn order). Pursuit fires after the unit's Normal ATK.

turn_order.source: Battle-Mechanics.md ('in order of its Speed'); EntryEffect.csv 50=Hero ATK Spd; no client-side sort (server supplies RoundData.BList order)

restraint.modifies: damage DEALT by the restrained (countered) side is reduced 25% (x0.75)
restraint.source: Tips.csv Id=350/row17; Language_SysTip rows 289,304; Language_Game 2209/2210; decompiled:10428,17380-17392 (RST->SoldierT); no client-side 0.75 factor

level_suppression.rule: higher-tier soldiers deal more damage to lower-tier soldiers

targeting.skills: random target(s) within the skill's targetCategory/targetCount unless text says otherwise

overrides.taunt_118: forces enemy Normal ATK onto the taunter
overrides.assist_120: redirects Normal ATK aimed at protected allies onto the bearer
overrides.chaos_117: Normal ATK + damage Tactical (and triggered Pursuit) hit random friend/foe; overrides Taunt

targeting.source: Tips.csv Id=90/row4; Game-Hints.md; Tips.csv Id=310 (Chaos); skills.md/status_effects.md

Strategic.when: before battle (or round-gated via Effect token[1] fromRound)

Tactical.when: on the unit's turn, probability = SkillP

Pursuit.when: after the unit's Normal ATK, probability = SkillP

trigger_prob_gear.note: percent gear effects that ADD to the skill's SkillP

skill_activation.insight_buff_150: raises activation probability of ALL the bearer's Pursuit skills

preparation_modifiers.instant_88: chance to cut a Tactical's preparation by 1 round
preparation_modifiers.superconducting_125: chance to re-cast a no-prep Tactical 1 additional time

damage_categories.mitigation: DMG Taken Reduced (8, Affected By DEF), Normal DMG Taken Reduced (36), Dodge(111), Shield(73)

damage_categories.what: lifesteal: restore soldiers on damage dealt

attribute_scaling.rule: 'Affected by X' always refers to the caster; effect scales ~x per 200 points of the named stat

in_battle_stat.hp_pool: Hero Soldiers Quantity (EntryEffect 54); max = 2000 + Level*500 + Advance bonus
in_battle_stat.source: Battle-Mechanics.md worked example; Game-Hints.md; gear.md; resolver.hero_stat_at

commander_role.on_death: generates a large number of severely-wounded soldiers (Tips.csv Id=430)
commander_role.siege_chariot_bombard: team can bombard buildings only if the Commander fields Chariot soldiers (Tips.csv Id=770)

impasse.behaviour: If neither commander is wiped after 8 rounds, a REMATCH occurs: a fresh 8-round bout is fought with troop counts CARRIED OVER from the end of the previous bout's round 8. This repeats until one side's commander loses all troops.
impasse.buff_carry_over: UNKNOWN_SERVER_SIDE (simulator assumes transient buffs reset each bout; troop counts persist)
impasse.resolution: decided when a commander is wiped across any bout

modeling_assumptions_server_side: restraint_application_point (apply x0.75 to restrained attacker's outgoing damage)
proc_resolution_order_and_rng (resolve in activation order, single seeded RNG)
unknown_server_side: Core damage equation (RetVal mapping from stats/coefficients).
Restraint -25% application (rule stated; no client-side 0.75 factor).
Speed tie-break / sub-ordering within equal Speed.
Within-bucket target selection beyond 20/40/40 normal-attack weights.
'Affected by X attribute' coefficient (the /200-points rule is community-stated).
Real DMG / Splash base magnitude (only 'ignores DEF' stated).
Commander hidden combat aura (none stated; assumed none).

calibration_rosetta._about: Constants confirmed/tuned against the in-game Rosetta-Stone battle log (simulatorTestCase.txt) + user-stated facts. These are what the engine (simulator/engine/model.py ModelConfig) uses; server formula still UNKNOWN.
calibration_rosetta.dmg_taken_reduced_cap_note: Stacked DMG-Taken-Reduced (e.g. Star Shield '90.17%+30%') nets to ~74% EFFECTIVE reduction, NOT near-immunity. Evidence: Magic Spear hit the shielded commander 2,139 vs 19,116 on an amplified target same round (ratio 0.112).
calibration_rosetta.counterattack_coef_note: Counterattack deals 0.84x a normal hit (passive 'DMG Coefficient 0.70+0.14').
calibration_rosetta.stalemate_carryover_note: After a stalemate, the rematch grants All Hero DMG Dealt +33% per prior stalemate (log L676 'Stalemate-1 +33%'); troop counts carry over.

prepared_cc_reroll_base.note: carry-over prepared Silence re-rolls each round at 40% (ally) / 60% (enemy), +flat

lv80_stat_allocation_cap_by_star.note: free stat-point cap at Lv80 = 50 advance + 79 level + 50 per breakthrough tier

assault_real_dmg.note: Ghost-Bone-style Assault Real DMG (~671-726/hit) bypasses DEF and shields; the only reliable way to kill a heavily-shielded commander.

calibration_rosetta.match_cadence_observed: 5 in-game runs of one favoured matchup: 4x (stalemate -> victory, 2 bouts) + 1x (victory, 1 bout); player won all 5.

skill_stone_rules.no_duplicate_note: USER-CONFIRMED: an identical skill stone cannot be equipped on two heroes in the same formation/team (rule is per-team; the two opposing teams may each use the same stone).
skill_stone_rules.per_category_note: Prior decode of the in-game rules text (wiki/Heroes/Skill-Stones.md) + the original test case (1 stone of each category per team) suggest stones may also be limited to ~1 Strategic + 1 each Tactical/Passive/Pursuit per team. Awaiting user confirm.
skill_stone_rules.stone_is_4th_skill: A skill stone grants the hero a 4th equipped skill (it fires in battle, e.g. the log's 'Use [Magic Spear]'). NOT YET MODELLED in the engine (build = main + 2 modular); to be added with the incoming calibration data, with the no-duplicate (and any per-category) constraint enforced on stone selection.
